race.comment: Open race. FAST 'N' INZAINE (11) resumes from a spell of five months and does go well when fresh, including a maiden win to launch last campaign over 1000m at Sandown-Hillside. She's lightly raced and profiles nicely for this having had experience here earlier in her career. Top pick at each way odds. BRAVE CAROL (9) resumed over 1100m at this track last start and was too good for her rivals, scoring by one length. Open to plenty of improvement and can go on with it. WHITSON (12) did a great job to score by a head over today's course and distance last time out to continue his outstanding recent form. Have to respect in the form he's in of late. MAFEE (2) raced on the speed from the outset and went to score by 0.8 lengths last time over 1000m at Pakenham Synthetic. He maps well again and should take beating.
